changelog: v3.5.86 - WiseCP runtime field isimleri DUZELTILDI (Yunus debug ciktisindan)
Tespit: Yunus options_keys gosterdi -> dogru field isimleri:
Field isimleri WiseCP'ye uyumlu hale getirildi
Panel adi otomatik tespit: panel_type -> DirectAdmin/cPanel/Plesk
Debug blogu genisletildi: config, ftp_info, server_features dahil tum runtime variables
